headline: Apple Ditches Budget Smartphone Segment With iPhone 16E Launch
summary: In a strategic shift, Apple has unveiled its latest product, the iPhone 16e, marking its exit from the budget smartphone market.

headline: Pony AI, Celsius And WeRide Are Among Top 9 Mid Cap Gainers Last Week (Feb 17-Feb 21): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?

headline: New Michael Wolff Book Exposes Previously Undisclosed Trump Secrets
summary: Michael Wolff, a renowned author, has penned a new book that promises to reveal undisclosed secrets about President Donald Trump, offering a fresh perspective on his life and political career.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Feb 17-Feb 21): Mexico Warns Alphabet Over Naming of the "Gulf of Mexico" On Maps, Apple Launches iPhone 16E & More
summary: South Korea's commission halts new downloads of DeepSeek due to privacy concerns. Google fined in Russia for hosting video on surrendering.

summary: Tech and automotive sectors experience ups and downs: Rivian's new vehicle, SpaceX's delay, Tesla's sales slump, and Nikola's bankruptcy.

summary: Apple makes headlines with new budget iPhone, US investment pledge, revenue boost prediction, possible price increase, and wireless charging for iPhone 17 Pro.

headline: Elon Musk Demands Federal Workers Justify Their Jobs — FBI's Kash Patel Tells Employees Not To Respond
summary: Elon Musk is demanding that federal employees justify their positions to him through email or lose their jobs.

headline: Bill Gates' Concerns, Nvidia' Leap In Genetic Research, Elon Musk's Grok Beats OpenAI's ChatGPT, And More: This Week In AI
summary: The week was abuzz with news from the tech world, with AI in the spotlight. Bill Gates warned of challenges for future generations, while Nvidia and Alibaba made strides in assistive tech and AI.

headline: Author of Upcoming Elon Musk Biography Questions His 'Intellectual Achievements'
summary: Elon Musk's intellectual abilities have been called into question by his biographer, Seth Abramson. Abramson has disputed the widely held belief of Musk's intellectual achievements, asserting that there is no substantial evidence to support such claims.

headline: Cardone Exits XRP, Dogecoin Millionaire's Conviction Plays, Schiff's Concerns, Pepe Bull's Predictions, And Musk's Dogecoin Endorsement: This Week In Crypto
summary: The week was a rollercoaster ride in the world of cryptocurrency. From Gary Cardone exiting his XRP position to Elon Musk embracing his meme status with Dogecoin  (CRYPTO: DOGE), the crypto market was buzzing with activity. Here’s a quick round-up of the top stories.
